style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A pyramid divided into horizontal layers labelled, bottom to top, CONTRIBUTORS, MANAGER, DIRECTOR, LEADERSHIP. On the LEFT half, broad bands of fine detail at the base narrow as upward arrows pass through each layer, captioned COMPRESSION, with a small note near the apex reading GROUND TRUTH, COMPRESSED. On the RIGHT half, a single arrow leaves the apex and fans out, widening downward into a row of labelled unit boxes FINANCE, OPS, SERVICE at the base, captioned CONTEXTUALIZATION, with a small note reading WHAT DO WE DO MONDAY. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

On the LEFT half, broad bands of fine detail at the base narrow as upward arrows pass through each layer, captioned COMPRESSION, with a small note near the apex reading GROUND TRUTH, COMPRESSED.
